title: ASTU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: ASTU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Assam Science and Technology University Result 2026 has been released for B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture and B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination 2025 on 24 March 2026. Check and download ASTU B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture & Horticulture results online at astu.ac.in.

content.text: Assam Science and Technology University has officially released the ASTU Result 2026 for the B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination 2025 and the B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination 2025, declaring the results on 24 March 2026 for the current academic cycle. These ASTU B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons) Horticulture end semester results 2025 give undergraduate students a complete view of their theory and practical performance, CGPA and pass status for the concerned semesters.

ASTU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - astu.ac.in - where students can access the results section, open the relevant result notice pages and download their marksheets or gazette using their roll number/enrolment details as guided by their college/ERP login. After viewing their ASTU UG result 2026, candidates should carefully verify their personal details and subject‑wise marks, and immediately contact the university or college examination cell if any discrepancy is found.

Assam Science and Technology University has published the latest ASTU UG end semester results 2025 for B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture and B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture through dedicated result notices on its official site. These results are hosted under the ASTU exams/results section, allowing students to directly open the notice pages and download the provisional score sheets or PDF gazettes.

headers: ASTU Result 2026 - Key Highlights (B.Sc Hons Agriculture & Horticulture)
rows: Provisional university results published online via ASTU ERP/notice pages

content.text: ASTU has activated separate notice pages for the B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture and B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture 2025 end semester results, linked through the central results/announcement page. The table below lists the active result notices along with direct “View Result” links so that students can quickly reach their specific course result.

links.label: Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025
Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025

sections.heading: How to Check ASTU Result 2026 Online

items: Open the official ASTU website https://astu.ac.in in your browser.
Go to the “Examination / Result / Notifications” section, or directly visit the results page at https://astu.ac.in/?page_id=116.

In the list of result notices, locate: “Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025” “Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025”.
“Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Horticulture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025”
“Results Notice of B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture (ASTU ERP) End Semester Examination, 2025”.

Click on the relevant result notice; a detailed page will open (for example, ?page_id=39718 for Horticulture and ?page_id=39715 for Agriculture), usually containing an attached PDF or an ERP link for viewing marks.

If a PDF gazette opens, use Ctrl+F and enter your roll number/enrolment number to find your record; if an ERP/login link is provided, follow it and log in with your student ID/roll number, password or other credentials as instructed by your college.
Once the result appears, check your name, programme (B.Sc Hons Agriculture / Horticulture), semester, paper‑wise marks, credits and overall result status (Pass/Fail) carefully.
Download or print the provisional result/marksheet and keep it for academic records, scholarship applications and registration for the next semester or practical components.
If you observe any discrepancy in marks or personal details, promptly contact your college examination cell or the ASTU examination branch with supporting documents for clarification or correction.
